findings.title: SQL Injection in Floor Designer ORDER BY clause
findings.description: The dir parameter is directly concatenated into the SQL ORDER BY clause, allowing time-based blind SQL injection.
findings.impact: Full database compromise via SQL Injection.

findings.title: Remote Code Execution in Floor Designer save_as_floor_plan
findings.description: The save_as_floor_plan action accepts a user-provided file extension without whitelisting, allowing PHP file uploads.
findings.reach: Accessed via AJAX action in modules/floor_designer/index.php
findings.impact: Remote Code Execution on the server.

findings.title: Broken Access Control in IDFs API endpoints
findings.description: Specialized API endpoints lack RBAC enforcement, allowing low-privileged users to perform restricted actions.
findings.impact: Unauthorized modification or deletion of IDF position data.
